reason: Schema extension decision: EXP-183 proposes adding 6 author_* fields (author_claim_class, author_registry_status, author_strict_prospective_confirmed, author_visible_badge, author_registry_integrity_note, author_claim_context) to wins.json. This requires architectural judgment about whether to add fields when 60/71 WINs have no author_claim_class data. Not verification-class — requires cross-cutting design decision.
